revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Shinto Wiki:Citing sources]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Shinto Wiki:Citing sources]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Shinto Wiki:Citing sources]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Shinto Wiki:Citing sources]]</includeonly> <noinclude></noinclude>

revision.comment: removing these dumb broken links that cause problems
